{{Infobox concept
| name = Silverfang Carp
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Silverfang Carp Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Silverfang Carp are large fish that inhabit a specific habitat and function as a food source for larger [[Ghostwater]] specimens, such as [[Diamondscale Sea Drakes]]. They are raised in a manner similar to livestock. While they possess savage power and can attack in large schools, making the air appear hazy with their movement, they are also capable of being hunted and consumed. However, human consumption of the fish is dangerous; eating the meat can cause severe medical emergencies, including organ failure, seizures, and paralyzing pain.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Silverfang Carp are schooling fish that were raised like cattle to serve as food for larger [[Ghostwater]] specimens. Although they are not intended for human consumption, their meat can be eaten to promote muscle growth and physical vitality. As the fish approached the habitat, [[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]] managed to finish a specimen nearly a week prior. The creature was ultimately killed by the strike of [[Lindon]]'s [[Remnant]] fist, and its meat served to nourish [[Lindon's body]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Silverfang Carp]] are fish that are not meant to be eaten by humans and were raised like cattle to feed larger specimens of [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Silverfang Carp]] meat promotes physical vitality and muscle growth.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Silverfang Carp]] was killed by [[Lindon]]'s [[Remnant]] fist.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] and [[Orthos]] finished the [[Silverfang Carp]] almost a week before.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Silverfang Carp]] are approaching the habitat.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Silverfang Carp]] are fish that gather in schools.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Silverfang Carp]] are creatures that can be eaten for meat.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The meat of the [[Silverfang Carp]] nourished [[Lindon's body]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Silverfang Carp]] meat is highly potent.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
